M89/#624, JUDGE W DOUGLASS, CSR D PADILLA, CLK H HAMILTON 1400: CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER FOR PLAINTIFF, WHO IS PRESENT. JOHN LASTOWSKI FOR DEFENDANT, WHO IS PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. DEFT SHALL MOVE OUT OF 180 DIAMOND ST, S.F. BY MIDNIGHT 5-15-98. PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY $5000 TO DEFENDANT ON OR BEFORE DELIVER OF KEYS TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SHALL NOT BE REQUIRED TO MAKE PAYUMENT IF FT COMPLY. SAID SUM TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIF'S ATTORNEY IN TRUST TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & FEES. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE DISPOSED OF PER LAW. IF DEFT FT COMPLY, PLTF MAY SEEK AN EXPARTE JUDGMENT WITH 24 HOURS WRITTEN NOTICE. PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING ON THE PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE. DEFT AGREES NOT TO DISTURB THE TENANTS IN OTHER UNITS, AND WILL PERMIT CARPETING TO BE INSTALLED, IF FURNISHED.

REPLY DEC. OF ATTY. RAIFSNIDER REGARDING MOT. TO COMPEL DEFT. PAUL QUIN TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESP. TO SPECIAL INTERROGAT. & FOR MONETARY SANC. AGAINST DEFT./HIS ATTY. JULIAN LASTOWSKI FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTIN, WAYNE
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO MAR-23-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 624 PER STIP AND ORDER AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, PARTIES STIP TO ADVANCE SETTL CONF DATE ONLY.
